issue.title: Design: homepage font selection — Outfit or Sora for headings, system fonts for body
issue.description: Pick a custom font for headings that has personality — Outfit or Sora are top candidates. Body text stays on system fonts for speed. Deliverable: font pairing recommendation with weight/size specs for h1-h4, body, captions.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
